notes:
sân = yard or courtyard — an open area outside a house or building.  

It’s a noun, usually used with cái when counting: một cái sân.  
Very common pairings: sân nhà (home yard), sân trường (school yard), sân bóng (soccer field), sân vận động (stadium).  
It can also mean a sports ground/field depending on context, not just a small yard.  
Think of it as the open space where people gather, play, park, or dry things.
exampleSentences: Buổi sáng, anh thường ra sân uống cà phê và đọc báo.
Trẻ con trong xóm thích chơi bóng ở sân nhà em.
Chị vừa quét xong lá rụng ở sân trước nhà.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ở ___.

translation.en: We will meet at the yard.

example.es: Los niños están jugando en el patio.
example.en: The children are playing on the yard.
example.vi: Trẻ em chơi đùa trên sân.

definitions.vi: Một khu vực đất mở, thường được phủ cỏ, được sử dụng cho giải trí hoặc thể thao.
definitions.en: An open area of land, typically covered with grass, used for recreation or sports.
definitions.es: Un área abierta de tierra, generalmente cubierta de hierba, utilizada para recreación o deportes.

translation.en: The children are playing in the yard.

exampleSentencesTranslated: In the morning, I usually go out to the yard to drink coffee and read the newspaper.
The children in the neighborhood like to play ball in my yard.
She just finished sweeping the fallen leaves in the yard in front of the house.
notes_md:
**sân** = yard or courtyard — an open area outside a house or building.  

It’s a noun, usually used with **cái** when counting: *một cái sân*.  
Very common pairings: **sân nhà** (home yard), **sân trường** (school yard), **sân bóng** (soccer field), **sân vận động** (stadium).  
It can also mean a sports ground/field depending on context, not just a small yard.  
Think of it as the open space where people gather, play, park, or dry things.
